SeedHammer Studio

Text plate

# H heading *x* italic _x_ underline | a | b | + | - | - | table
Drop an .svg, or click to choose
—
payload
strokes
time
—
payload

      

    


    

      

        
        

          
Loading the firmware…

          

            
          

          
The real SeedHammer II firmware, running in your browser. Drag
            to navigate — it's a touch device. Load composed plate taps whatever you
            designed on the Text, Rich, or Graphics tabs into this emulator, exactly as a scanned
            NFC tag would. It never reaches a real machine — “Send” on the editor tabs does that.

          

            
Engraved plate (SVG)

            

            
The vector plate the firmware just planned, resembling the engraved
              steel. Produced when you reach the engrave step — a downloadable artifact, nothing more.

    Download firmware (unsigned)
    Boot-key & signing guide
